primary_topics: Miami hanging garden building case (martensitic 410 stainless failure)
Hyatt Regency Kansas City collapse (comparison case)
Ferritic stainless steels and ductile-brittle transition
Austenitic stainless steel sensitization (chromium carbide precipitation)
304 vs 304L vs LN stainless (argon oxygen decarburization)
Chloride stress corrosion cracking in austenitics
Superferritic stainless for high-efficiency boiler flue liners
cases_introduced: Miami hanging garden tension connection failure (2012)
standards_referenced: ASTM A262 (sensitization test, 10% oxalic acid etch)
section_break_note: Section breaks for layer 3 not assigned in this pass; lecture has natural pivots at approximately p17 (Miami case → ferritic stainless lecture) and p31 (austenitic chloride cracking → home boiler anecdote). Total lecture content covers ~28 minutes ending at break announcement.
